# Browser Fingerprint Reference

Browser persona and TLS-client integration behavior was compared with:

- `RoodraNambisa/go_registrar2.0` at commit `e7eef0fa43989bdef0bb555f6080de9951e91cdb`.

This was a behavioral reference for Go TLS fingerprints, cookie persistence, proxy handling, and browser header ordering. No source code was copied from that repository.
